messages.content: Help me compare two weekend getaway options near the coast.

{"type":"comparison","options":["Cliffside Escape","Island Hopper"],"rows":[{"dim":"Pace","cells":[{"title":"Relaxed","text":"2 stops per day","tag":"easy"},{"title":"Packed","text":"5 stops per day","tag":"intense"}]},{"dim":"Price","cells":[{"title":"$180"},{"title":"$240","tag":"pricey"}]},{"dim":"Best for","cells":[{"title":"Slow weekend"},{"title":"Seeing more"}]}],"summary":"Pick **Cliffside Escape** for a slow, scenic weekend; choose **Island Hopper** if you'd rather see more in two days."}
